Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Oct-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sasha Collins appeared by zoom for Gayle Draper-Brown (petitioner).
Joseph Corey appeared by zoom for respondents.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The court grants the request to remove Joseph Corey as trustee and appoints John DePiazza. Mrs. Collins is to provide a form of order. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 15, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 22, 2024. The remaining balance of the Petition for Redress of Breach of Trust, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on October 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
